updates.text: A mesoscale convective area is developing over Hong Kong with estimated rainfall intensity around 100 mm/h. The cell appears organised enough to warrant close monitoring for nearby coastal and inland impacts.

announcements.text:
1. Expect heavy rain of about 30mm/h to form over the next 2-3 hours.
2. About 20mm/h of heavy rain is currently impacting on most parts of Hong Kong.
